Title: Running the Gauntlet
Description:
The CDF has partnered with Anvil Aerospace to find the most capable operatives in the system. 

If you find one of these Platinum certifications, you can redeem the ticket at a ship kiosk at New Deal, Astro Armada or Crusader Showroom for a free F8C. 

The catch is that your identity and location has been shared with participants throughout the system. For everyone else, if you can stop the ticketholder before they get to the kiosk, you can claim the ticket for your own.

Whoever makes it will not only receive this next generation superiority fighter, but also prove that they have what it takes for the toughest CDF assignments.

Good luck.
